steps.name: implementation
steps.acceptance: All code changes implemented in src/model.py, src/data.py, src/train.py: asymmetric clamping, log-det regularization, soft equivariance augmentation, EMA class, OneCycleLR option. Code committed.

steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Diagnostic run (500 steps) completes. log_det_per_dof stays in [-2, 2]. Loss decreases. Diagnostic report written.

steps.name: plan
steps.acceptance: Plan Sub-report with SANITY/HEURISTICS/SCALE angles written, approved by Postdoc.

steps.name: angle_sanity_val
steps.acceptance: SANITY validation run (2000 steps) completes. Promising if valid_fraction > 0.1 on any molecule.

steps.name: angle_sanity_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B Bayesian sweep (~30 runs) over log_det_reg_weight, alpha_pos, lr completes. Best config selected.

steps.name: angle_sanity_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run with best sweep config (10000+ steps). Success: valid_fraction >= 0.5 on at least 4/8 molecules.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_val
steps.acceptance: HEURISTICS validation run with SBG recipe (AdamW, OneCycleLR, EMA, batch_size=512). Promising if valid_fraction > 0.1.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: If val promising: sweep over EMA decay, LR, weight_decay. Best config selected.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run with best HEURISTICS config (20000+ steps). Success: valid_fraction >= 0.5 on at least 4/8 molecules.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.acceptance: SCALE validation run with d_model=256, n_blocks=12. Promising if improvement over prior angles.

result.justification: Model saturates at step 150 — alpha_pos saturation is a mathematical equilibrium, not capacity limitation. Loss flat from step 150 across both SANITY and HEURISTICS. Larger model hits same equilibrium. Per plan spec.

steps.name: angle_scale_full
steps.acceptance: Full SCALE run (50000 steps). Success: valid_fraction >= 0.5 on at least 4/8 molecules.

result.justification: SCALE skipped — same reason as val.

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final Experiment Report written to reports/final_report.md and committed.

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir. src/ reflects current practice. All code promoted.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_003. Pre-merge checks pass.
